title: burtonia diosmifolia var. glabrescens
intro: Burtonia diosmifolia var. glabrescens, also known as the Glabrescent Burtonia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and discomfort, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Burtonia diosmifolia var. glabrescens is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
